pixie_silk.name: Pixie Silk
pixie_silk.description: Fine, glowing threads left behind on branches by wandering Fairies.
pixie_silk.lore: The Loom recognizes these — they're offcuts from its own work, left wherever Fairies sleep.

gnome_iron_ore.name: Gnome-Iron Ore
gnome_iron_ore.description: Dense, sturdy metal mined from shallow caves. Essential for basic armoring.
gnome_iron_ore.lore: Goblins hoard it. Gnomes refine it. Everyone else just finds it useful.

enchanted_bark.name: Enchanted Bark
enchanted_bark.description: Wood from trees that listen to music. Still hums if you hold it right.
enchanted_bark.lore: Dryads shed this bark deliberately. Whether it's a gift or a warning is debated.

harpy_down.name: Harpy Down
harpy_down.description: Lightweight aerodynamic feathers. Gear made from these practically flies itself.
harpy_down.lore: Harpies lose these mid-flight. Collectors who chase them rarely catch them.

kelpie_scale.name: Kelpie Scale
kelpie_scale.description: Slimy but incredibly tough. Resists heat, cold, and most reasonable damage.
kelpie_scale.lore: Kelpies don't give these willingly. They do, however, shed them when startled.

hellhound_ember.name: Hellhound Ember
hellhound_ember.description: A chunk of charcoal that never stops smoking. Handle with caution.
hellhound_ember.lore: Stays warm for years. Some collectors use them as pocket heaters. Inadvisable.

unicorn_hair.name: Unicorn Hair
unicorn_hair.description: A shimmering silver strand that radiates quiet, steady energy.
unicorn_hair.lore: Left on fence-posts and low branches. Unicorns are generous with these, which is suspicious.

manticore_stinger.name: Manticore Stinger
manticore_stinger.description: A hollow venomous spike. Adds poison or piercing modifiers to anything it's forged into.
manticore_stinger.lore: The Manticore lost this in a fight it won. Make of that what you will.

basilisk_eye.name: Basilisk Eye
basilisk_eye.description: A calcified glassy orb. Still faintly warm. Used to ward off status conditions.
basilisk_eye.lore: Looking into it now is fine. It stopped working when it left the Basilisk. Probably.

phoenix_ash.name: Phoenix Ash
phoenix_ash.description: Warm glowing soot with a faint cinnamon smell. Carries latent revival energy.
phoenix_ash.lore: Collected from Phoenix rebirth sites within the first hour. Loses potency after that.

thunderbird_talon.name: Thunderbird Talon
thunderbird_talon.description: A crackling claw that stores static electricity. Sparks when handled.
thunderbird_talon.lore: Shed during storms. Finding one means a Thunderbird flew over recently. Look up.

sphinx_papyrus.name: Sphinx Papyrus
sphinx_papyrus.description: Fragments of ancient indestructible scroll. The text is different each time you look.
sphinx_papyrus.lore: The Sphinx writes continuously. These fragments escape on their own.

dragon_scale.name: Dragon Scale
dragon_scale.description: Harder than diamond and completely fireproof. The gold standard of armoring.
dragon_scale.lore: Dragons shed these once a decade. Entire economies have been built around collecting them.

kraken_ink.name: Kraken Ink
kraken_ink.description: A pitch-black fluid that warps light around it. Difficult to store.
kraken_ink.lore: The Kraken produces this defensively. Obtaining it requires either luck or very fast swimming.

fenrir_fur.name: Fenrir Fur
fenrir_fur.description: Thick icy fur that shrugs off magical attacks. Stays cold regardless of environment.
fenrir_fur.lore: Found along Fenrir's patrol routes. It sheds in winter. The winters up there are very short.

tear_of_the_creator.name: Tear of the Creator
tear_of_the_creator.description: A floating droplet of pure space-time. Used only in the most powerful forgings.
tear_of_the_creator.lore: What the Loom cries when something breaks. Collecting it feels intrusive, but trainers do it anyway.

blighted_world_core.name: Blighted World-Core
blighted_world_core.description: A corrupted pulsing fragment from a half-finished Divine. Dark energy, barely contained.
blighted_world_core.lore: What's left in the ground after an Altered Divine is finally finished. The Loom leaves these behind like scars.

chronos_gear.name: Chronos Gear
chronos_gear.description: A perfectly spinning golden gear that ticks on no known schedule.
chronos_gear.lore: Twine recognizes these. It won't say where they come from, but it gets very still when one is nearby.
